title: Switch to Android easily — and bring your data with you.
summary: With the launch of Samsung’s new Z Series at today’s Galaxy Unpacked , we introduced a new native migration experience built directly into Android 17 that lets you transfer even more data types from an iPhone wirelessly — without downloading a separate…
